overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking and running along a mountain trail through rocky terrain, pine forests, and grassy meadows with wildflowers on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge trail with distant peaks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a mountain trail toward a prominent rock spire in the distance

entered.detail: tall rocky spire dominating the horizon ahead
steep rocky terrain rising on the left side of the trail
scattered evergreen trees along the right side of the path
narrow dirt path winding through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open mountain ridge trail under a clear blue sky. A prominent rocky peak dominates the distant center view while scattered pine trees line the right side of the path and rocky slopes rise on the left.

events.description: patches of red wildflowers become visible along the trail edges as the terrain becomes more vegetated

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through grassy terrain, passing red wildflowers on the trail sides

entered.detail: clusters of bright red flowers growing alongside the dirt path
large rock formations closer to the trail on the left

segments.scene_description: The trail descends into a more vegetated valley area where red wildflowers line the path. The distant mountain peak disappears behind the rising terrain as rocky outcrops move closer on the left and the vegetation becomes denser.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valley with valley view

events.description: character stops walking briefly to look around at the surrounding landscape

agents.ego_description: pausing on the trail to survey the surroundings, then continuing forward at a slower pace

entered.detail: distant valley opening visible through the trees ahead
dense cluster of pine trees on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character pauses to observe the surroundings in a denser forested area where a view of the distant valley opens up ahead. The trail becomes more enclosed by pine trees and the wildflowers give way to shaded forest floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with large boulders

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the forest trail

agents.ego_description: running along the winding forest path, navigating around trees and rocks

entered.detail: massive gray boulder sitting beside the trail on the right

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run through a densely forested section of the trail, passing large boulders on the right. The path becomes more winding and enclosed by trees, with the distant valley view now obscured by the forest canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from an open, high-altitude ridge into a lush, sheltered valley. It begins with the character walking under a clear blue sky, where a prominent rocky peak dominates the distant horizon and scattered pine trees line the path. As the trail descends, the distant peak gradually disappears behind the rising terrain while the surrounding vegetation becomes denser. The scene then shifts as the open ridge gives way to a more enclosed area, with rocky outcrops moving closer on the left and vibrant red wildflowers beginning to line the path.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open mountain vista into the claustrophobic depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with the character pausing in a forested area where the trail is still open enough to reveal a sweeping view of a distant valley. As the character breaks into a run, the path becomes more winding and the wide vista is gradually obscured by a thickening canopy of trees. The scene then shifts further into the woods, passing large boulders on the right as the bright wildflowers of the meadow are replaced by the shaded forest floor. Finally, the camera follows the character deep into the enclosed greenery, where the surrounding pines completely wall off the horizon.
